evidence_summary: Establish the romantic stakes and the central motivation for the escape.
John Carter visits Dejah Thoris in her quarters. He formally declares his devotion to her and commands her to work with him to facilitate their mutual escape.
medium two-shots to capture intimacy and intensity of the declaration.
